name: Node.js
description: Installs and configures the Node.js runtime globally.

nodeVersion.description: The version of Node.js to install. Must be an absolute version (e.g. 24.11.0); semver ranges are not supported.

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This dev container has Node.js pre-installed globally with npm, npx, and corepack available on the PATH. Use `node` to run JavaScript, `npm` for package management, and `npx` to run packages without installing them globally. The Node.js version is pinned to a specific release for reproducibility.
